title: Continuous Delivery Outcomes, Flow, Feedback, and Evidence · Workflow and Release Recall
summary: An operations handoff reconstructs continuous delivery outcomes, flow, feedback, and evidence from delayed run evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the delivery outcome and evidence map under changed load. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for delivery outcome and evidence map after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish continuous integration, delivery, deployment, release, and feature exposure by their automation, decision, and stakeholder boundaries.
Relate batch size, queue time, feedback latency, failure isolation, recovery cost, and learning speed without treating deployment frequency as the objective.
Trace requirement, source revision, review, checks, build inputs, immutable artifact, deployment, observation, and recovery evidence as one delivery chain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries · changed case · Review Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries
steps.instruction:
review case — A review service deploys 5 times per week but cannot connect reviewed source, required checks, immutable artifact, production revision, user signal, abort decision, or recovery. Define value and delivery evidence without gaming one metric. Competency probe: Distinguish continuous integration, delivery, deployment, release, and feature exposure by their automation, decision, and stakeholder boundaries.

Which action demonstrates Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries · changed case · Review Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries.

For Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries · changed case · Review Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries, keep Ci Ci Cd Release Boundaries connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.
